refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable monitoring, controlling, and optimizing energy consumption to meet the customer-defined energy efficiency target.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and high-level. To design effectively, it is necessary to break it down into sub-functions that cover measurement, control, and optimization of energy usage, which directly impact achieving the energy efficiency KPI.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify through system telemetry data that energy_per_ton ≤ E_target over the evaluation period, and confirm control and optimization functions are active and effective.
sub_frs: FR1: Measure energy consumption and tonnage moved accurately.
FR2: Control vehicle operations to minimize energy usage.
FR3: Optimize operational parameters to improve energy efficiency.

candidate_dps: DP1: Integrate energy and load sensors with telemetry system for real-time measurement.
DP2: Implement vehicle control algorithms to adjust power usage dynamically.
DP3: Develop optimization software modules analyzing operational data to recommend adjustments.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Integrate energy and load sensors with telemetry system for real-time measurement.

potential_sources: Telemetry data dependency between measurement and control modules
Optimization algorithms relying on accurate measurement data
coupling_check.notes: DP1 logically precedes DP2 and DP3, forming a stable base with low coupling risk if interfaces are well defined.

assumptions_risks: Assumes sensors provide accurate and reliable data under all operating conditions.
Risk of sensor failure impacting energy efficiency monitoring.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing sensor data acquisition separately to isolate sensor risks.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical components including energy and load sensors, and embedded telemetry hardware.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Sends real-time energy consumption and tonnage data to NGHE Solution for monitoring and optimization.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data communication between Vehicle and Teleoperation or Safety Services modules.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as sensors and telemetry hardware are physically part of the vehicle; low diffusion risk.
Receives data but does not contain measurement hardware; higher diffusion risk if measurement logic is duplicated.
Minimal containment; mainly consumes telemetry data.
No containment; only receives alerts unrelated to energy measurement.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Energy measurement DP is best contained within the Vehicle module to ensure data accuracy and minimize interface complexity.
containment_risks: Potential hardware failure in Vehicle sensors impacting data availability.
Dependency on Network Link reliability for data transmission.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate redundancy or fallback mechanisms for sensor data within Vehicle module.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (sensor integration and telemetry) directly satisfies the refined FR of measuring energy consumption accurately.

diffusion_risks: Risk of duplicated measurement logic if telemetry data processing is implemented outside Vehicle module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Assigning DP to Vehicle module ensures strong containment and reduces diffusion risk.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by cross-checking sensor data with telemetry outputs and energy efficiency metrics.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of measurement function to Vehicle module with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Consider adding fallback data validation within NGHE Solution to handle sensor anomalies.
Plan for sensor maintenance and calibration as part of Vehicle module ownership.

decision.justification: While the measurement function is well defined and assigned, the overall FR decomposition should be expanded to include control and optimization sub-FRs to fully address the energy efficiency KPI.
next_level_sub_frs: FR2: Control vehicle operations to minimize energy usage.
FR3: Optimize operational parameters to improve energy efficiency.

revise.why: To decompose the high-level energy efficiency requirement into comprehensive sub-functions enabling complete design coverage.

assumptions: Sensors provide accurate data under all conditions.
Network Link is reliable for telemetry data transmission.
open_risks: Sensor hardware failure impacting measurement accuracy.
Potential data loss or delay over Network Link.
evidence_needed: Sensor calibration and reliability test results.
Telemetry data integrity and latency measurements.
